reasoning: Doc L163's attribution is correct: AdapterFactory lives in factories/adapter-factory.ts (:25) and IAdapterFactory in interfaces/adapter-registry.ts (:88). The finding's decisive claim — 'JavascriptAdapterFactory extends BaseAdapterFactory, not AdapterFactory' — is a misreading of an import alias: javascript-adapter-factory.ts:11 imports 'AdapterFactory as BaseAdapterFactory', so :36 extends the real AdapterFactory. Positive-assertion requirement: the targeted doc statement is not contradicted.
gray_reason: The same doc section contains a genuinely wrong neighboring assertion (L165 'Most adapters ... extending the AdapterFactory base class' — sibling factories implement IAdapterFactory directly), so a charitable confirm-at-info is defensible.
